column6: This is a Follow Up to the correction that you previously made. It was too much to address all at once. So this is Part 2!  Please bear in mind that the Correct "pūrvapada" for this compound is simply the Official Headword: "śiñjat mfn. tinkling, rattling, sounding &c. [ID=216847]". Therefore, this Corrected Compound MUST be Relocated Directly AFTER the Headword: "śiñjat [ID=216847]".  Furthermore, the Window Display must be corrected as follows: "śiñjad—" —> "śiñjat—".  A Final Point to bear in mind is that the Headword: "śiñjad in comp. for °jat. [ID=216848]" NO LONGER RELATES to this Corrected Compound: "śiñjatṣaḍaṅghri". Thus everything must be corrected as stated above:  The Relocation Must Be Made AND the Window Display corrected so that the "pūrvapada" reads as: "śiñjat—".
